response.justification: Bogdan is a capable full-stack engineer with strong distributed systems experience and broad language coverage, but the resume shows no meaningful alignment with the core domain of this role: experimentation platforms, A/B testing infrastructure, feature flagging, telemetry pipelines, or growth measurement systems. The role requires Principal/IC6 seniority with specific depth in experimentation quality and bias detection, while the candidate's background is generalist web/backend with no evidence of owning or architecting experimentation or metrics infrastructure at any scale.
strengths: High-throughput distributed systems experience at Dunnhumby (millions of HTTP requests/second with low-latency, async I/O design)
Broad language portfolio covering several required languages (C++, C#, Java, JavaScript/TypeScript) and multi-paradigm fluency
Demonstrated staff-level scope across multiple companies with cross-functional influence, workshops, and open-source project ownership
concerns: Zero evidence of experimentation platform, A/B testing, feature flagging, or rollout-risk management experience — the core domain of this role
No telemetry infrastructure, metrics pipelines, or experimental analysis work mentioned anywhere in the resume
Current and historical titles are Senior/Staff, not Principal; no evidence of IC6-scope ownership across multi-team, multi-workstream initiatives
